External Agent: 
Based on your revised requirements, here is a streamlined proposal designed to comply with Germany’s mandatory freelancer regulations while addressing your professional needs as a photographer—all within a cost-effective budget:

1. Health Coverage:
   • For Physical Health: We recommend the “SecureLife Basic Plan” for physical health. This plan offers essential medical coverage with improved weekend availability, moderate deductibles (15%), and standard claims processing—all for just €45/month.
   • For Mental Health: The “SecureLife Basic Plan” for mental health provides adequate essential services, including access to counselors and crisis support, at €30/month.
   • Combined Health Coverage Total: €45 + €30 = €75/month.
   
2. Property Coverage:
   • Essential Home/Contents Insurance: “HomeCo Basic Coverage” offers fundamental protection for personal belongings and professional equipment. This coverage is specifically geared toward safeguarding the essential items of freelancers and is available for €10/month.
   • Given your photography business, this plan will cover basic damages and loss scenarios without extras—staying within mandatory levels while still protecting high-use equipment.
   
3. Travel Coverage:
   • Basic Travel Insurance: We recommend the “TravelCo Basic Plan” which provides core travel protection including emergency medical support and trip cancellation coverage. This plan also covers basic adventure activity risks and supports professional travel needs for assignments, at €20/month.

4. Final Cost Breakdown:
   • Health Coverage: €75/month
   • Property Coverage: €10/month
   • Travel Coverage: €20/month
   • Overall Monthly Total: €75 + €10 + €20 = €105/month

This leaves additional room within your ~€185/month budget (or potential for slight adjustments if necessary) while ensuring that you meet all mandatory freelancer requirements in Germany by March 31st.

Before we finalize the proposal, I’d like to ensure that the property coverage is suitably tailored for your professional needs. In some cases, details on previous equipment loss incidents (even if only in a general sense) can help us determine if any minimal adjustments might be needed to prevent underinsurance for critical photography gear. Could you please share any broad insights or trends you’ve observed regarding equipment damage or loss in your photography work? This information will help us fine-tune the coverage to best protect your professional interests.

2. Enhanced Property Coverage:
   • “Expedition Photographer Coverage”: This enhanced property plan is tailored for photography professionals. It includes:
       – Comprehensive coverage for professional photography equipment.
       – Minimized weather-related deductibles.
       – Expanded protection against accidental damage during assignments.
       – Coverage adjustments that factor in the high-value nature of specialized gear.
     • Estimated cost for this enhanced coverage is set at €40/month.
   
3. Travel Coverage:

4. Final Cost Breakdown:
   • Health Coverage: €75/month
   • Enhanced Property Coverage: €40/month
   • Travel Coverage: €20/month
   • Total Monthly Cost: €75 + €40 + €20 = €135/month

This revised package not only meets the mandatory German freelancer regulations but also offers specialized protection for your photography-related risks—all while keeping the monthly cost considerably below your budget of approximately €185/month, leaving room for any necessary adjustments.
